ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "credit_amount" REAL /* Amount of credit requested */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., radio/TV, education) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score assigned to the application */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Unique alphanumeric identifier for each loan application */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate assigned to the loan */,
  "payment_schedule" TEXT /* Frequency of loan payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "approved_amount" REAL /* Amount of credit approved for the loan */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan amount was disbursed to the applicant */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the applicant (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job type */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing status */,
  "saving_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the saving account type */,
  "checking_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the checking account type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the applicant was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the applicant's information was last updated */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Applicant's social security number for identity verification */,
  "address" TEXT /* Applicant's residential address */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Applicant's current employment status (e.g., employed, self-employed, unemployed) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Applicant's annual income */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Applicant's credit score for creditworthiness evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_saving_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("saving_account_id") REFERENCES saving_accounts ("saving_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_types ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_checking_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("checking_account_id") REFERENCES checking_accounts ("checking_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_types ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type (e.g., personal loan, car loan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate_range" TEXT /* Range of interest rates applicable to this loan type */,
  "processing_fee" REAL /* Processing fees associated with this loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job (e.g., skilled, unskilled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_types" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing type */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status (e.g., own, rent, free) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the housing status */,
  "rent_or_own" TEXT /* Whether the housing is rented or owned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saving_accounts" (
  "saving_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saving account type */,
  "saving_account_status" TEXT /* Saving account status (e.g., little, moderate, rich) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the saving account status */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the saving account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saving_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checking_accounts" (
  "checking_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checking account type */,
  "checking_account_status" TEXT /* Checking account status (e.g., little, moderate, rich) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the checking account status */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the checking account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checking_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose (e.g., radio/TV, education) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the loan officer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Loan officer's job title */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the loan officer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_officers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., loan_officer, risk_analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application being reviewed */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer reviewing the application */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the loan officer during the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application at the given date */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for changing the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)
